title: Azure Event Hubs Schema Group
description: A schema group is a logical grouping of schemas within the Event Hubs Schema Registry. Schema groups define the serialization type (e.g., Avro) and compatibility mode (e.g., Backward, Forward) for schemas registered within the group. The Schema Registry enables schema-driven event serialization and deserialization for Event Hubs producers and consumers.

id.description: Fully qualified resource ID for the resource.

name.description: The name of the schema group.

updatedAtUtc.description: Exact time the Schema Group was updated.

createdAtUtc.description: Exact time the Schema Group was created.

groupProperties.description: Dictionary object for SchemaGroup group properties.

schemaCompatibility.description: Schema compatibility setting that determines what changes are allowed when registering new schema versions.

schemaType.description: Schema serialization type used by schemas in this group.

systemData.description: Metadata pertaining to creation and last modification of the resource.
